title: Root Layout Component (`app/layout.tsx`)
content:
This file defines the root layout for the entire application. It sets up the basic HTML structure, includes global CSS, and applies font variables. **Purpose:** * Establishes the foundational HTML document structure (``, ``). * Applies global styling and dark mode. * Integrates Clerk authentication provider. * Defines metadata for the application (title and description). * Loads custom fonts (Geist Sans and Geist Mono) for consistent typography. **Key Exports/Functions/Props:** * **`metadata`**: An object containing SEO-related metadata for the application. * **`RootLayout`**: The default export, a React component that wraps all other application pages. It accepts `children` as a prop, which represents the content of the current page. **Usage Example:** This layout is automatically applied to all pages within the `app` directory. Developers don't typically need to import or use it directly. It serves as a wrapper for the entire application's content. ```tsx // Example of how a page component would be rendered within this layout: // app/page.tsx export default function HomePage() { return (

Welcome to DocMed!

This content is rendered inside the RootLayout.

); } ```
